{{Infobox character
| name = Lindon's mother
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon's mother]] is a [[Forger]] and a [[Soulsmith]] who specializes in manipulating [[madra]] as a physical material.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon's mother]] can bind a [[Remnant]] version of a fruit back to its physical vessel.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon's mother]] led the work on the four forged snowfoxes and was expecting a reward from the Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
